results.title: Sunsure Energy commissions 105 MWp solar plant in Mahoba; kicks off Uttar Pradesh’s first green power evacuation under Green Energy Corridor-II
results.description: Kabrai Project, commissioned in record 4 months, takes Sunsure’s operational capacity in UP to 365 MWp NEW DELHI, May 30, 2026 /PRNewswire/ — Sunsure Energy, India’s preferred Round-the-Clock renewable energy solutions provider for leading businesses and utilities, today announced that it has commissioned the 105 MWp project in Uttar Pradesh’s Mahoba District in record 4 months [...]

results.title: Auto driver receives appreciation from police officials.
results.description: A Rajasthan trader recovered Rs 5.64 lakh, after an honest auto driver handed over the cash-filled bag to the police.

results.title: 56 Police Personnel Complete Tourism Policing Training Programme at NSCBPTI
results.description: Sri Vijaya Puram | May 30, 2026 A total of 56 personnel of Andaman and Nicobar Police successfully completed a five-day training programme on Tourism Policing conducted by the Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Police Training Institute (NSCBPTI), Sri Vijaya Puram, in collaboration with Rashtriya Raksha University (RRU), Gandhinagar, Gujarat. The programme, held from May 25 [...] The post 56 Police Personnel Complete Tourism Policing Training Programme at NSCBPTI appeared first on Nicobar Times .
